## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Package ownership

<!-- Which packages/areas does this touch? See CONTRIBUTING.md subagent ownership. -->

- [ ] I stayed within the intended package scope for this change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build:packages` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run test:packages` passes locally (when relevant)
- [ ] Added a [Changeset](https://github.com/changesets/changesets) if this should publish to npm
- [ ] Ran `npm run catalog:sync` if public React exports changed
- [ ] Ran `npm run metadata:sync` if `package-metadata.shared.json` or publishable packages changed
